null_zero_policy: if both pass proportions are zero classify ARTEFACT_GEOMETRY_ONLY; if real is positive and null is zero NULL_RATIO is zero

exact_test.name: one_sided_exact_binomial
exact_test.alternative: real pass proportion greater than null

evidence_labels.INDETERMINE: zero real passes or denominator integrity failure

price_null_policy.preserved_fields: exchange timestamps, stable event order, trade sizes, aggressor sides, explicit contract and session identity
price_null_policy.reconstructed_prices: for each completed minute, subtract the linear bridge from real first to real last trade; add the residual path to a linear bridge from frozen null-minute open to null-minute close; round every reconstructed trade to the ES quarter-point tick
price_null_policy.recomputed_fields: all executed-price levels, occupancy shares, entropy, revisits, modes, excursions, mode migration, direction predicates, signals, OHLC paths and account episodes
price_null_policy.future_relation_destroyed: null minute open-to-close changes come from the preregistered daily block shuffle, volatility-matched random walk or year-block permutation

primary_metric: account-level net expectancy after frozen costs
CONTRE: The null reconstruction preserves the realized residual shape of each within-minute trade path while replacing its linear price bridge; this can be conservative or generous depending on how much occupancy topology is driven by that residual. Raw counts, exact-binomial evidence and candidate economics remain separate.
